## Observations

- You said your concern level was 5/5. It's good that you're concerned. Awareness is the first step to managing AI risk.
- You didn't indicate that your AI is *always truthful*, *transparent*, or *explainable*. These are properties that should matter to you — their absence may be worth investigating.
- You indicated that you're using Generative AI. Generative AIs have a host of problems because they are language models, not world models. Their goal is plausibility, not truth. Producing things that *seem* true — and doing so at enormous scale — makes it harder to find information that is actually true.
